summary: Cloud storage file manager application with file/folder upload, view toggling, and progress tracking
architectural_notes: Cloud storage file manager with upload/download capabilities
Grid and list view modes for file display
File operations: upload, create folder, download, share, move, delete
known_issues: Upload/create buttons were blocked during file uploads (fixed in v0.4.143)
Long filenames were not truncated in cells (fixed in v0.4.143)
Button styling lost simple black/white design (restored in v0.4.143)

existing_features.title: Add individual file upload progress statistics during multi-file uploads in the current upload area, displaying stats for each file being uploaded

Merge the two view toggle buttons (identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[2]/button[1] and /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[2]/button[2]) into a single button that toggles between list and grid views
Add a tooltip to the single view toggle button that displays on mouse hover
Truncate long filenames in the Name column cells to maintain consistent cell dimensions, ensuring the cell width and height do not change
Add tooltips to filenames in the Name column that display the full filename on mouse hover
Restore simple black/white button styling with subtle colored borders for Upload Files (blue border), New Folder (yellow border), and Upload Folder (yellow border) buttons as shown in image-167.png
Add tooltips to action buttons (download, share/copy link, move, delete) that display on mouse hover
Do not add tooltips to Upload Files, New Folder, or Upload Folder buttons
Update the application version to 0.4.143 in frontend/src/lib/appVersion.ts

new_feature_requests.summary: Display individual file upload stats during multi-file uploads
Merge grid/list view toggle buttons into single button with tooltip
Truncate long filenames in cells with full name tooltips on hover
Restore simple black/white button styling with colored borders (blue for Upload Files, yellow for folders)
Add tooltips to view toggle and action buttons (not upload/create buttons or filenames)
